_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn what safe and unsafe mean.

_source.w: We learn what safe and unsafe mean.
y: Knowing about safety helps us protect ourselves.
Understanding safe and unsafe is one of the most important things we learn.
These ideas help us make good choices about our body and surroundings.
eg: We learn that hot things are unsafe to touch.
We practise staying close to trusted adults in new places.
We learn about safe and unsafe ways to use playground equipment.
We explore which things are safe to put in our mouth and which are not.
We learn to stop at the road and wait for an adult.
We practise saying 'no' or moving away from things that feel unsafe.
